data.title: Diversified Healthcare Trust Announces Quarterly Dividend on Common Shares
data.description: Diversified Healthcare Trust (Nasdaq: DHC) declared a standard quarterly cash dividend for its common shares at $0.01 per share ($0.04 annually) to be paid to shareholders of record as of April 21, 2026. The distribution is expected to be made around May 14, 2026. DHC is a Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) that specializes in owning top-tier healthcare properties.

data.title: Service Properties Trust Announces Quarterly Dividend on Common Shares
data.description: In Newton, Massachusetts, Service Properties Trust (Nasdaq: SVC) disclosed a standard quarterly cash distribution for its common shares at $0.01 per share ($0.04 annually). The distribution is slated for SVC common shareholders on record by the end of business on April 21, 2026, with the distribution process expected to occur around May 14, 2026. SVC, a real estate investment trust, has around $10 billion invested in two primary asset categories, concentrated on service-focused properties.

data.title: Industrial Logistics Properties Trust Announces Quarterly Dividend on Common Shares
data.description: In Newton, Massachusetts, Industrial Logistics Properties Trust (Nasdaq: ILPT) revealed their regular quarterly cash distribution for their common shares at $0.05 per share ($0.20 annually). This distribution is slated for common shareholders of record by April 21, 2026, with distribution occurring around May 14, 2026. ILPT functions as a real estate investment trust (REIT) concentrating on possessing and leasing top-tier industrial and logistics properties.

data.title: Seven Hills Realty Trust Announces Quarterly Dividend on Common Shares
data.description: Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) based in Newton, Massachusetts, disclosed a standard cash dividend for its common shares amounting to $0.28 per share, totaling $1.12 per share annually. This distribution, declared today, is scheduled to be disbursed to SEVN common shareholders recorded by the end of business on April 21, 2026, with the payout expected around May 14, 2026. Specializing as a real estate investment trust (REIT), Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) focuses on originating and investing in real estate ventures.

data.title: Emily Griffith Technical College Launches Employer-Designed Leadership Program for Construction Professionals
data.description: In Denver, Emily Griffith Technical College has introduced the Project SCALE High Potential Leadership Program, aiming to train experienced construction workers for frontline and project leadership positions. The program is a product of the Project SCALE Construction Collaborative, jointly hosted by the Associated General Contractors of Colorado and Colorado Succeeds. This initiative caters to professionals seeking career advancement opportunities in the construction industry.

data.title: Redfin Reports Pending Home Sales Post Biggest Decline in 3 Months as High Rates, Iran War Chill Market
data.description: In Seattle, U.S. pending home sales experienced a significant 2.4% year-over-year decline in the four-week period ending on April 5 according to a recent report by Redfin, a real estate brokerage backed by Rocket. This marks the largest decrease in three months. Providence, RI saw the most substantial drop at 15.5%, followed by Houston at 15.4% and New York at 15.3%. Conversely, West Palm Beach, FL witnessed a notable 20.9% increase, with San Francisco following at 16.7% and San Jose, CA at 11.4%. The market also noted a slowdown in home sales with the average home taking longer to sell after being listed.

data.title: Shake Shack to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: Shake Shack Inc. (NYSE: SHAK) is set to announce its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 7, 2026, before the market opens. The conference call to discuss the earnings will be held at 8:00 a.m. ET, hosted by Rob Lynch, the Chief Executive Officer. To join the call, dial (877) 407-0792 for domestic callers or (201) 689-8263 for international participants. Those unable to participate can access a replay of the call later.

data.title: Presto Announces Return of Co-founder Krishna Gupta as CEO, Marking A Successful Q1
data.description: SAN MATEO, Calif.-- Presto Phoenix, Inc. revealed that Krishna Gupta is reinstated as the Chief Executive Officer following a successful first quarter. Gupta, a co-founder and a key figure at Presto, has resumed the CEO position as the company ramps up the implementation of its drive-thru Voice AI platform in prominent national restaurant chains. Presto is gearing up to exhibit its advancements in enterprise-grade Voice AI technology for quick-service restaurants as it continues to expand its reach.

data.title: American Rare Earths Defines Wyoming-Led Pilot Plant Pathway to Accelerate Pre-Production Rare Earth Oxide
data.description: Denver, 09 April 2026 - American Rare Earths (ASX: ARR | OTCQX: ARRNF | ADR: AMRRY) has announced the advancement of its pilot plant program for the American Rare Earths Halleck Creek Project in Wyoming. Initial processing will occur in Wyoming through DISA Technologies and Western Research Institute, followed by final stage hydrometallurgical processing and oxide separation at the Saskatchewan Research Council in Saskatoon, Canada. The Company has formalized agreements with Western Research Institute, DISA, and SRC to conduct mineral processing activities at their facilities.

data.title: Nancy L. Lewis, MD, MBS, FACP, Named New Chief Scientific Officer for National Comprehensive Cancer Network (NCCN)
data.description: A proficient leader in medical research has been appointed to supervise NCCN programs focused on enhancing clinical trials and elevating the standards, efficiency, and availability of cancer treatment. The announcement was made in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania on April 9, 2026, by the National Comprehensive Cancer Network® (NCCN®) — a coalition committed to promoting excellence in cancer care.

data.title: Cornerstone Capital Bank Launches Team Member Stock Ownership Program
data.description: The establishment of an Employee Stock Ownership Plan (ESOP) by Cornerstone Capital Bank highlights its dedication to Team Members, Clients, Shareholders, and Communities. Introduced in Houston on April 9, 2026, the 'Cornerstone Cares' program, alongside various community service projects, symbolizes the bank's commitment. This initiative demonstrates a significant step forward by the bank to ensure active involvement and benefit for its Team Members, Clients, Shareholders, and the wider community.

data.title: L2 Aviation Appoints Tony Bailey as President and Chief Operating Officer
data.description: Tony Bailey will lead L2 Aviation with a continued emphasis on operational discipline, customer results, and technical advancement. The company is headquartered in ERLANGER, Ky. and CINCINNATI. As of April 9, 2026, L2 Aviation is a renowned worldwide provider of avionics integration, certification, and aircraft solutions.

data.title: Tronox Announces Dates for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release & Webcast Conference Call
data.description: Tronox Holdings plc (NYSE: TROX) from Stamford, Conn., revealed its plans for the first quarter 2026 earnings release and webcast conference call. The financial report is set to be released on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, after the market closes, available through PR Newswire and Tronox's platforms. This update was shared on April 9, 2026, with respective details for interested stakeholders.

data.title: NKGen Biotech to Present Troculeucel Mechanism Data in Alzheimer’s and Frontotemporal Dementia at the Neuroimmunology Drug Development Summit
data.description: Santa Ana, California, on April 9, 2026 - NKGen Biotech, Inc. (OTC: NKGN), a biotech company, will share information about its primary research, troculeucel, at the 8th Annual Neuroimmunology Drug Development Summit in Boston, Massachusetts from April 14-16, 2026. The company specializes in pioneering autologous and allogeneic natural killer (“NK”) cell therapies.

data.title: Altcoin slump: Fartcoin drops 28%, Hyperliquid sees $84M liquidation amid volatility surge.
data.description: The volatility of altcoins surged notably as Fartcoin experienced a significant 28% decline from its highest point. Concurrently, Hyperliquid witnessed liquidations totaling $84 million.
